category_sources: Official GitHub/Go package README describes Minica as a simple certificate authority for generating certificates.
source_facts.description says Small, simple certificate authority.
display_name_sources: Official repository and source_facts.name use minica.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation; Go package documentation mirrors the official README and links to the repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jsha/minica; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes CA behavior, root certificates, end-entity certificates, and CLI usage.
